title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 22 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 22 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 22 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3%, the main contract I2405 closed 977, some traders were negative to sell,But steel mills are cautious and cautious, resulting in a decrease in inquiries. PBF at Shandong port dealt 1022-1027 yuan/mt; increased 7-12 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 1040-1045 yuan/mt; increased 12-16 yuan/mt over yesterday.
